creator: fbugs@s403.33mail.com
text:
There is wrong information displayed in rtGui (net-p2p/rtGui) when accessing rtorrent's (net-p2p/rtorrent) RPC mechanism. This is a known problem :

http://code.google.com/p/rtgui/issues/detail?id=12
http://code.google.com/p/rtgui/issues/detail?id=13

Updating to the latest xmlrpc-c should fix this.
It would be nice to either update the port, or make a -devel branch if there's concern of instability.

Thanks!
